title: Topsoe and Sasol Selected to Deliver Innovative e-Fuels Technology for an eSAF Demonstration Plant in Germany
content: Topsoe and Sasol have been selected to provide their G2Lâ„¢ e-fuels technology for the initial built-up of the German Aerospace Centerâ€™s Technology Platform Power-to-Liquid Fuels at the Leuna Chemical Complex in Germany. Once commissioned, expected in Q4 2027, the plant will produce, for research purposes 2500 tons per year of e-fuels mainly sustainable aviation fuel (SAF).
author: Analysts Account
